description: A medical illustrator needs a specific base image for a textbook cover. Generate a high-contrast 3D visualization of the skull from the loaded CT Cranium scan. The visualization must feature a red 3D bone surface against a solid white background, with the 3D bounding box and reference axes hidden. Orient the camera to a clean anterior view and export the result as a PNG to /home/ga/Documents/illustration_base.png. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
